insights: The market has undergone a structural shift, stabilizing at a higher baseline (1300+) compared to the sub-1000 levels seen early in the month, suggesting a sustained increase in hiring capacity.
Data Engineering and Infrastructure/SRE roles are showing consistent upward momentum, indicating that companies are prioritizing core technical foundations over generalist software roles.
The 7-day average (1348) exceeding the 30-day average (1254) confirms a strong short-term growth trend, likely driven by renewed hiring cycles in the Unicorn and FAANG+ sectors.
